default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Pixis and GrowthX teams to discuss content progress, performance updates, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [11 articles ready to publish; glossary completed but not yet migrated](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Slight dip in traffic (week 15), but 4% improvement in keyword visibility](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [New backlink from Ignite Visibility (DR 44) for AI marketing statistics article](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [WordStream identified as strong content competitor; potential for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)

## Topics

### Content Progress

  - [11 articles staged and ready for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Rachel completed the glossary (available in Airtable)](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Two new statistics articles in progress, fact-checked by freelance team](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Colin scheduled article publishing for next several weeks](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### CMS Challenges

  - [Aida experiencing difficulties with Craft CMS, particularly with image insertion](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Colin questioning the necessity of content blocks in Craft CMS](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Speculation that Craft is attempting to mimic headless CMS functionality](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)

### Performance Updates

  - [Week 15: Slight dip in traffic, but within normal fluctuations](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [SEMrush position tracking:](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [4% improvement in overall keyword visibility](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [28 keywords improved positions, 10 decreased](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
      - [New keyword in top 3: "cons of AI in digital marketing"](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
      - [5 new keywords in top 10](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [Pixis homepage briefly ranked for "AI in marketing"](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Competitor Insights

  - [WordStream identified as strong content competitor](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Potential for collaboration with Rob Blover (WordStream content marketer)](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Colin downloaded WordStream's benchmark report; they reached out for potential content collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Analytics Issues

  - [GA4 implementation problem: capturing session numbers but not associated data (e.g., page paths)](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida and Rachel to stage glossary terms once migration is available](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Colin to reach out to Rob Blover (WordStream) for potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Continue publishing staged content (1 article per day for next several weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [Monitor performance of newly published content](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Investigate and resolve GA4 implementation issues](https://fathom.video/share/FFEKT7LYszmE5jSzy7_oB-Uhfe4XmVsP?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
